publishedAbstract: The heketi-pod does not start and fails into CrashLoopBackOff state with the errors below: ~~~ error: Unable to export db. DB contents may not be valid OFFLINE COMMAND: update dbvol [heketi] INFO 2020/05/11 16:24:51 Loaded ssh executor [heketi] INFO 2020/05/11 16:24:51 Trying to open db in read only mode ERROR: Unable to start application: invalid page type: 15: 10 HEKETI_PRE_REQUEST_VOLUME_OPTIONS is modified HEKETI_PRE_REQUEST_VOLUME_OPTIONS is server.tcp-user-timeout 42 Heketi 9.0.0-9.el7rhgs [heketi] INFO 2020/05/11 16:24:51 Loaded ssh executor ERROR: Unable to start application: invalid page type: 15: 10) ~~~
publishedTitle: heketi pod does not start. Crash Loop Back-off error: Unable to export db
